creator: basher2@gmail.com
text:
With DVD FreeBSD-9.1-RELEASE-i386-dvd1.iso 
In sysinstall->Configure->Packages->CD/DVD

i got this error message:

Warning: The disc currently in the drive is either not a FreeBSD disc or 
it is an older (pre 2.1.5) FreeBSD CD wich does not have a version number on it.

How-To-Repeat: With DVD FreeBSD-9.1-RELEASE-i386-dvd1.iso
with root
type: sysinstall 
In sysinstall->Configure->Packages->CD/DVD
